name: Honeywell International
analysis: HON has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $232.2100, stop $203.4648, target $318.4456 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
